arts.ttl: Arsenal star William Saliba makes Real Madrid transfer decision as fresh talks emerge
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back William Saliba has made it clear he intends to stay at the Emirates Stadium despite interest from Real Madrid. The French international has been on Madrid’s radar as their top defensive target for the upcoming summer transfer window, but Saliba has no plans to leave north London any time soon. Speaking ahead of […] The post Arsenal star William Saliba makes Real Madrid transfer decision as fresh talks emerge appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Roberto Firmino transfer hint as future 'intentions' made clear
arts.sum: According to Brazilian journalist Jorge Nicola, the player's wife would like to return to England, and a move to Flamengo has been ruled out, opening the door for Arsenal to make a move. Arsenal have been told that they would not currently face any competition to sign former Liverpool forward Roberto Firmino .

arts.ttl: Arsenal close to first summer signing after €58 million winger ‘agrees’ transfer
arts.sum: Nico Williams is reportedly set to join Arsenal this summer in what would be a significant coup for the north London club. The Athletic Club winger has been linked with a move to the Emirates Stadium for over a year, with Arsenal pushing hard to bring him in during the 2024 summer transfer window. arts.ttl: William Saliba Named His Pick for 'Best' Defender In Football History
arts.sum: Arsenal ace William Saliba named Real Madrid star Sergio Ramos as the best defender in football history.

arts.ttl: William Saliba hails legendary former Real Madrid defender Sergio Ramos as the 'best in history'- before giving a nod to an 'unbelievable' Premier League rival
arts.sum: The Frenchman heaped praise on the combative centre-half, who enjoyed unprecedented success at the Bernabeu during his 16-year stay in the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: The decision Barcelona have now taken with Raphinha amid Arsenal interest
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm what Barcelona have now decided to do with Raphinha amid interest from Arsenal. The Gunners have had a solid enough...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. PSV: Mikel Arteta provides fitness boost regarding Ben White ahead of second leg
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta provides a positive update on the fitness of defender Ben White, who has spent much of the last four months on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Saka injury boost as dream Champions League scenario emerges
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Arsenal will be hoping for a dream Bukayo Saka injury return scenario to play out in their pursuit of Champions League glory. With their last-16 tie all but wrapped up, Arteta may not want to risk him and instead hand him a first start in over a month when Chelsea make the trip to Emirates Stadium this weekend.

arts.ttl: 'Special': Robin van Persie names the Arsenal legend who actually used to train with his shoelaces undone
William Saliba makes honest admission over performances and opens up on Arsenal future
arts.sum: Arsenal star William Saliba spoken honestly about his performances this season and his future, with Real Madrid interested in signing the 23-year-old France international
